data.title: Binance introduces review mechanism to remove unqualified tokens
data.description:
Binance announced on March 12 that its Alpha platform has implemented a new comprehensive token review framework that will aim to remove tokens that don’t meet certain quantitative and qualitative criteria.The quantitative metrics include trading volume stability, liquidity depth, frequency of onchain transactions and distribution of tokenholders. The qualitative metrics include project team...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/binance-alpha-review-mechanism-remove-unqualified-tokens?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Why old-gen consoles are still getting game releases: PS5 and Xbox Series need more games
data.description:
Over four years into the current console generation, we’re still seeing game releases, like WWE 2K25 and Like a Dragon: Pirate Yakuza in Hawaii, launching on the PS5 and Xbox Series X|S and the 12-year-olds PS4 and Xbox One. I’m not saying that gamers on old-gen don’t matter, but isn’t it time to let them […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/old-gen-consoles-game-releases-ps5-and-xbox/

data.description:

data.title: SUI Bulls Test Key Resistance — A Breakout Or Rejection Ahead?
data.description:
SUI recent price recovery has reignited bullish sentiment, but its momentum is now being put to the test. After bouncing from key support levels, the price is facing strong resistance that could determine the next major move. Bulls are attempting to push through this barrier, but a lack of sustained buying pressure has made the breakout uncertain. Market indicators reveal a tug-of-war between...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/sui/sui-test-key-resistance/

Ethereum ETF: $22M Outflows, BlackRock Leads Decline
data.description:
Investors continue to withdraw funds from crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs), with Ethereum ETF seeing significant outflows. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $371 million on Tuesday, marking the seventh consecutive day of withdrawals. Further, Ethereum ETF recorded outflows of $22 million, reinforcing concerns about declining investor interest in cryptocurrency investment vehicles....
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/12/ethereum-etf-22m-outflows-blackrock-leads-decline/

data.title: Indian authorities arrest alleged Garantex founder for US extradition
data.description:
Officials with India’s Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) announced the arrest of Lithuanian national Aleksej Bešciokov, who was alleged to have operated the cryptocurrency exchange Garantex. In a March 12 notice, the CBI said police in the Indian state of Kerala had coordinated with national authorities to arrest Bešciokov. The Lithuanian national was reportedly vacationing in India with...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/india-arrest-aleksej-besciokov-garantex?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump announces response to EU's retaliatory tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump announced that he would respond to the EU's counter-tariffs. There will be flexibility on the tariff issue, but once it starts, the flexibility will be very limited. April 2 will be a very important day. (Jinshi)
